call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Oh, hi. I'm alright. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: Actually, I was thinking about a new car. 
Agent: Perfect! A car loan is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, that's… pretty good. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed at 8.99%? 
Agent: Absolutely. Fixed for the life of the loan. We can get the paperwork started right away if you'd like. 
Eleanor: Yeah, okay. Let's do it.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we acquired your information through… uh… a marketing partner. We're pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers… 
Robert: No, thank you. Don't call me again. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I understand you were referred to us by Green Bank? 
Jessica: Yeah, a friend mentioned you guys had good rates. 
Agent: Absolutely! We strive to offer the best. So, we are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. What are you planning to use the funds for? 
Jessica: I'm thinking about renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: Excellent! A kitchen renovation is a great investment. Now, our rates are significantly lower than Green Bank's current rates for similar loan amounts. They're at 8.25%, I believe? 
Jessica: Oh, really? I hadn't checked. 
Agent: Yes, and we also have no prepayment penalties. You can pay it off early without any extra fees. The monthly payments would be around $290 for 60 months. 
Jessica: That sounds pretty good. What's the catch? 
Agent: No catch! Just a small origination fee of $150. We're very transparent about our fees. We can also look at different loan terms if you'd prefer. 
Jessica: Hmm, let me think about it. Can you send me some information via email? 
Agent: Absolutely! I'll send you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms and a link to our online application.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Davis? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We're offering… 
Michael: (Interrupting) Look, you guys called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 17.99%… 
Michael: 17.99?! Are you serious? This is ridiculous! I want my number removed from your list! 
Agent: Sir, please… 
Michael: No! Just take me off your list! *click*

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for a personal loan on our website. 
Patricia: Oh, yes, hello. I did. I'm a little confused about the whole process, though. 
Agent: No problem at all, Ms. Rodriguez. I'm happy to explain everything. We are pre-approving you for an $8,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 14.99%. What are you hoping to use the loan for? 
Patricia: Well, I recently lost my job, and I need some help with bills while I look for something new. 
Agent: I understand. That's a perfectly valid reason. The monthly payments would be approximately $175 for 60 months. 
Patricia: Could you repeat that, please? I didn't quite catch the monthly payment. 
Agent: Certainly. $175 per month for 60 months. There's a one-time origination fee of $100. 
Patricia: Hmm, okay. That sounds… manageable. 
Agent: Great! We can also discuss hardship programs if you anticipate needing assistance with payments in the future. 
Patricia: Oh, that's good to know. 
Agent: I'll send you an email with all the details and a link to the application. Would that be alright? 
Patricia: Yes, please. That would be wonderful.
